title: gentiana campestris subsp. germanica
intro: Gentiana campestris subsp. germanica, also known as German Field Gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to stimulate digestive function and relieve indigestion. The health benefits of Gentiana campestris subsp. germanica include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea, and support the immune system. Gentiana campestris subsp. germanica is often used in herbal preparations, including tinctures, infusions, and teas, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
